title: Barter With Babies
body: Let baby piglins barter a little, just like the grown ups! Baby piglins' bartering is controlled by the wich:gameplay/baby_piglin_bartering loot table. By default, they will barter a piece of string [80% chance], brown mushroom [5% chance], red mushroom [5% chance], crimson roots [3% chance], or iron nugget [2% chance] in exchange for a single gold ingot.
